name: Code::Stats
description: Code::Stats plugin for the IntelliJ/JetBrains range of IDEs.
notes:
1.0.9

Disabled enter handling to fix issues with dialogs.

1.0.8

Refactored status bar to fix issue with hiding widget.

1.0.7

Refactored to get rid of deprecated APIs.

1.0.6

Send plugin version as user agent header when programming. Moved repos to GitLab.

1.0.5

Fix crash in opening new windows on new IDE versions.

1.0.4

Send local time offset with timestamp when coding. This will be used in graphs on the website later.

1.0.3

Make the last fix even better and add some nicer error output for user.

1.0.2 (unreleased)

Attempt to fix certificate errors caused by Java not having the Letsencrypt certificates in the trust store by default.

1.0.1

Fixed an issue where the plugin would crash when closing a project and opening a new one.

1.0

Initial version
